text:
To serve the `llms.txt` file at your Wix domain, follow these steps:

1. **Download the `llms.txt` file**:
   - In the Setup tab of your FlowBlinq GEO results page, download the `llms.txt` file.

2. **Access the Wix Editor**:
   - Log in to your Wix account and open the Wix Editor for your site.

3. **Add a New Page**:
   - Click on the "Menus & Pages" option on the left sidebar.
   - Click the "+" button to add a new page. You can name it something like "llms".

4. **Set Up the Page**:
   - On the new page, you can add a blank section or a text box. This will be where you will input the content of the `llms.txt` file.

5. **Input the Content**:
   - Open the `llms.txt` file you downloaded and copy its contents.
   - Paste the contents into the text box or section you created on the new page.

6. **Publish Your Site**:
   - Once you have added the content, click "Publish" in the top right corner to make the changes live.

7. **Access the File**:
   - You can now access the `llms.txt` file at `https://yourdomain.com/llms` (replace `yourdomain.com` with your actual domain).

This will allow AI agents to access the `llms.txt` file at your domain. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
